verses.text: 'Sing unto the LORD a new song,' letting Israel rejoice in their Maker and praise His name with dance and music. Fresh praise befits His mercies. The people of God express their joy in glad and varied worship.

'Sing unto the LORD a new song,' letting Israel rejoice in their Maker and praise His name with dance and music. Fresh praise befits His mercies. The people of God express their joy in glad and varied worship.

'Sing unto the LORD a new song,' letting Israel rejoice in their Maker and praise His name with dance and music. Fresh praise befits His mercies. The people of God express their joy in glad and varied worship.

'The LORD taketh pleasure in his people' and 'will beautify the meek with salvation'; let the saints be joyful in glory. God delights in His own. The humble are adorned with the salvation He gives, a cause for unceasing joy.

'The LORD taketh pleasure in his people' and 'will beautify the meek with salvation'; let the saints be joyful in glory. God delights in His own. The humble are adorned with the salvation He gives, a cause for unceasing joy.

With high praises in their mouth and a sword in their hand, the saints execute God's judgments on His foes; 'this honour have all his saints.' Worship and warfare meet. God's people honour Him by praising and by standing against evil.
